sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105123" key="tripenqhmimerh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρι-πενθημῐμερής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n105123.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">consisting of three</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πενθημιμερῆ,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:15:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
